purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured v3.51.7 atomic business-role allocation/delete flows, deterministic allocation editor and created-identity compensation UX produce 4,527,940 raw / 1,296,700 gzip JavaScript bytes: +18,790 raw / +6,250 gzip (+0.417% raw) versus the reviewed v3.51.6 artifact. The total ceilings retain only the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances. Largest JavaScript raw rises by the measured 8,188-byte product-contract delta and remains exact; largest gzip retains a 128-byte cross-platform allowance. CSS ceilings do not increase. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
